title: Culture
questions: Does your country have a strong cultural identity?
What are some important parts of your culture?
What is your national dish? Do you like it?
What 3 things do you like about your culture and why?
What do you dislike about your culture and why?
Has your country's culture changed much in recent years?
Are people in your country proud of the culture?
What do you think of America's culture?
What do you think of the British culture?
Is there any culture that really fascinates you? Why?
How do you feel about extremely liberal cultures? Why?
How do you feel about extremely conservative cultures? Why?
If you moved to a different country, do you think you would experience culture shock?
What do you think foreigners think about your culture?
What are some cultural places and traditions in your country that are interesting?
Can people from different cultures be real friends? Can they have a successful marriage?
Are there any things from your culture or another culture that you don't like? What?
Would you enjoy living in another country and trying to fit into that culture and community? Which cultures might you want to be a part of? Which ones would you definitely NOT want to be a part of?
